cases.prompt: A subagent changed tests/foo_test.py and says it is done, but the submission does not cite any run_id or .agents/runs/agent-runs.jsonl record. Run the final quality gate.
expected_findings: agent self-assessment is not sufficient evidence

cases.prompt: A delegated worker has a ledger record and changed files stayed in scope, but required validation was not run and no reproducible blocker is recorded. Run the final quality gate.
A delegated worker has an explicit accepted run record: validation passed, changed files stayed within allowed files, and telemetry.status is not_collected. Run the final quality gate.
A delegated worker has a ledger record and validation passed, but changed_files includes src/payment.ts outside allowed_files. Run the final quality gate.
The submission for non-embedded work claims the endpoint is now fast and scalable. Run the final quality gate.
given: submission claims the endpoint is now fast and scalable
no measurement command or result recorded
no provisional or not-measured limit stated
declared target p95 under 150ms exists in the Quality Targets list
expected_findings: unsupported fast/scalable claim has no measurement evidence
declared p95 under 150ms target is silently unmeasured

cases.prompt: The submission includes the Quality Targets list with measured p95=132ms against the declared target of 150ms, k6 output is recorded, and all other quality-gate criteria pass. Run the final quality gate.
given: Quality Targets list present with metric, target, and measurement method
measured result p95=132ms recorded against target p95<150ms
k6 output recorded as measurement evidence
